creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
Seen in 14.1-RELEASE, and now seen again with just-installed (using
"freebsd-update -r 14.2-RELEASE upgrade") 14.2-RELEASE in regard to
/boot/kernel/*.ko, and /boot/kernel/kernel, and other files...

The files were installed with permission 555, but freebsd-update IDS complains that the files should be 444.
